_comment: Workload defaults: number of patients N (per week), workload per patient Wnorm, and unshielded PRIMARY air kerma per patient (NCRP 147). Also Saudi SFDA national DRL values for KSA-specific CT/X-ray/mammo defaults. All values editable - users should enter their own facility's patient load and technique where known.

primary_kerma_per_patient._comment: NCRP 147 Table 4.5: unshielded PRIMARY air kerma K1_P (mGy per patient at 1 m, normalized to d_P = 1 m) and Wnorm (mA*min/patient). Only distributions whose primary beam strikes a barrier are listed; others contribute secondary radiation only.

patients_per_week._comment: NCRP 147 Table 4.3 typical patient numbers N (per week) - EDITABLE defaults for 'average' and 'busy' facilities. Enter your facility's actual patient load for accurate workload. Values approximate; confirm against your site.

saudi_ndrl._comment: Saudi SFDA National Diagnostic Reference Levels (MDS-G-008-V2, 2022, Annex 2). Use these CTDIvol/DLP/DAP/MGD values as KSA-specific per-examination defaults for workload/scatter calculations.

linac._comment: Megavoltage workload W (Gy at isocentre per week) - EDITABLE. SRS 47 worked example used W = 384 Gy/week (high-throughput). Typical conventional LINAC ~ 250-1000 Gy/week at isocentre; IMRT inflates monitor units (apply IMRT factor on leakage).
linac.imrt_factor_note: NCRP 151 IMRT factor C_I (ratio of MU delivered to MU at isocentre); applied to LEAKAGE workload. Typical 2-5 depending on technique.

use_factors_primary_default._comment: NCRP 151 typical use factors U (fraction of beam-on time the primary beam points at a given barrier). Editable.

linac.sad_note: Source-axis distance, typically 1.0 m (SRS 47 example used 0.8 m for the Co-60 unit).
